description: I am a data scientist. I find joy in untangling complex technical puzzles and building intuitive tools. I enjoy working with everything from AI agents and LLMs to machine learning and statistics. I also have fair amount of experience with full-stack development and MLOps to build complete solutions. My real passion is making data speak, turning intricate numbers into clear and compelling stories that anyone can understand and act on.

personal_information.Name: Pritam Dey

publications.description: MRI-based mild cognitive impairment and Alzheimer's disease classification using an algorithm of combination of variational autoencoder and other machine learning classifiers - (Journal)
